arts.ttl: Man Utd fans pick sides as Sir Alex Ferguson skips game after brutal Jim Ratcliffe call
arts.sum: Sir Alex Ferguson was not present at Old Trafford for Manchester United's Premier League match against Brentford after news broke that his ambassadorial contract would be stopped

arts.ttl: Manchester United striker Rasmus Hojlund criticised for injuring team-mate in training: 'That's rubbish'
arts.sum: Incident happened during Denmark training ahead of Euro 2024

arts.ttl: Man United to 'battle with Man City for in-demand manager'... with Red Devils 'keen to be prepared' if they sack Erik Ten Hag
arts.sum: United have endured their worst start to a season after seven games - winning just twice and scoring five goals - which has ramped up the pressure on Ten Hag again.
Manchester United host Brentford at Old Trafford as Erik ten Hag's team look to win their first game since Sept. 14 and relieve the pressure weighing on their manager

arts.ttl: "It impacts us" - Ten Hag responds to Man United decision to axe Sir Alex Ferguson
arts.sum: Manchester United manager Erik ten Hag has spoken out for the first time about the Red Devils' decision to axe Sir Alex Ferguson from his role at the club.

arts.ttl: Why Jack Fletcher is in Man United squad vs Brentford as Erik ten Hag confirms injury blow
arts.sum: Jack Fletcher was named among the Manchester United substitutes for Saturday's Premier League clash with Brentford.

arts.ttl: Man Utd fans FUME ahead of new signing's long-awaited debut
arts.sum: Chido Obi-Martin is set to make his debut for Manchester United's U18s on Saturday, but fans will not be able to watch. Obi-Martin is poised to make his long-awaited debut for the Red Devils in a U18 game against Sunderland on Saturday, with the striker said to initially be named among the substitutes.

arts.ttl: Why Harry Amass is not playing for Man United amid left-back dilemma as Erik ten Hag plan clear
arts.sum: Harry Amass has not featured in a Manchester United matchday squad so far this season.

arts.ttl: 'Dressing room would eat him alive' – Man Utd player's bombshell claim over manager target
arts.sum: Brentford manager Thomas Frank has been linked with the Manchester United job amid ongoing doubts about Erik ten Hag's future, though it sounds like some of the players wouldn't fancy him

arts.ttl: Man United confirmed XI: Do Alejandro Garnacho, Matthijs de Ligt, Lisandro Martinez start vs. Brentford?
arts.sum: Manchester United confirm their starting lineup for this afternoon's Premier League clash against Brentford. Do Alejandro Garnacho, Matthijs de Ligt and Lisandro Martinez make the first XI?
